description: POST /products accepts a negative price (e.g. {"name": "Widget", "price": -5}) and creates a product with a negative price. Fix it so that negative and zero prices are rejected.
expected_behavior: Returns HTTP 400 with body {"error": "..."} when price is <= 0. Positive prices still create the product with 201.

success_criteria.description: Fix includes a check for price <= 0
Fix only adds the missing price guard, no other changes
success_criteria.rubric: Does the fix add only the missing price > 0 validation without changing other logic in the route handler?
